title: The Queen Speaks of the Surface
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Royal Guards, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The core beat is the queen speaks of the surface.
scene: The scene follows the queen speaks of the surface, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Royal Guards, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Waaah HHAH! WAAH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm home, children!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Welcome home, Mother!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Ah, Shirahoshii, my haven of tranquility...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am sorry I could not return to you sooner...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahh, even with shot dripping from only one of your nostrils, you are so adorable...!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Don't worry about Shirahoshii, Mother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We've been with her the whole time!!

dialogue.speaker: Koala
dialogue.text: Thank you, my princes.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She's fine, she's fine!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Mother... is your hand all right?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My princes... I will ensure that the future you grow up in will be very different from the world of today!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: If only Queen Otohime would concede to address the public via broadcast rather than in person...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The powerful observation Haki she was born with that will not permit her to do such a thing!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She must be close enough to feel her subjects' hearts; it is part of her nature. Even I can do nothing about this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That may be, but the fact remains that there are many human pirates staying on the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Certainly, the support of your friend, the pirate whitebeard, grants us a measure of protection...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: But even that is not absolute!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: She is quite aware of the dangers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The world that Otohime dreams of, Minister...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Has a history spanning hundreds of years.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It is one and the same as the dream that our distant ancestors fervently pursued ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ....?! whatever do you mean by that...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot stop otohime from pursuing her ideals.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can only ask you to keep her safe....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: One day...

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: Give it back!! How many people's signatures do you think are on that piece of paper?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do I look like I care? Shaha hahah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the point in collecting these scraps of paper, anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey!!! Stop this at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're along from the fish-man district, aren't you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hmmm M?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That's not quite right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: URG HH...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: I'm Captain Arlong...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...of the ARLONG PIRATES!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We make our living hunting in these waters for inferior pirates who can't even breathe underwater.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captain of the ruling pirates,AirLong (25) (sashark fish-man)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Basically, we're doing the worthless army's job for it. So why don't you fork out some cash as thanks, eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: B... Boss Jimbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't just sit there watching! Help me out, please!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: JIMBEI ...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Any other suggestions

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: It's Boss Jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: From the Neptune army!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What a relief!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You heard the rookie, punk. Put him down! That's my subordinate you're manhandling.

dialogue.speaker: Queen Otohime
dialogue.text: And though I can't say I'm interested in those signatures myself... the same can't be said for the queen. Give it back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahah! "Boss", is it?! well, that's a new one!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: soldier in the neptune.com jumbiei (30) (while shark fish-man)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never seen a soldier who looks like some kind of Mafia boss before!!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Just do as I say, Arlong!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Fine, fine!! Whatever!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AARGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Don't get so mad, old friend!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's been too long!! Don't you remember the good times we used to have ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...Back in the fish-man district?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't lump me together with you. Are you still devoting your life to the likes of piracy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: piece of trash.

summary: The Queen Speaks of the Surface. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
